remarks.role: AI agent governance, security, accountability frameworks, enterprise AI deployment policy.
remarks.text: Six AI agent SDKs for enterprise Kubernetes, compared
remarks.content: There’s a question we hear constantly from platform and engineering leaders right now, “which agent SDK should we standardize on for our Kubernetes clusters?” The honest answer is that the question is slightly wrong, and... The post Six AI agent SDKs for enterprise Kubernetes, comp
remarks.contentTranslation: 我们现在经常从平台和工程领导那里听到一个问题， “我们应该为我们的Kubernetes集群标准化哪个AgentSDK ？“老实说，问题有点不对劲，而且……企业Kubernetes发布的Six AI agent SDK ，
remarks.translation: 六个用于企业Kubernetes的AIAgentSDK ，比较
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

grateful to the people that created the idea of america, everyone who built it over the past 250 years, and the people who will carry it forward for the next 250.

most impressive social experiment in history.

remarks.name: Guillermo Rauch
remarks.role: vercel CEO
remarks.text:
🏁 I animated the token 💰 spend race, from ~lifetime Vercel AI Gateway usage, which aggregates trillions of tokens from millions of developers a month.

Fascinating to see the fluctuations among the labs, Anthropic's dominance, and the rise of open weight AI. https://t.co/iX8oRA4SBP
remarks.translation: 🏁 我动画了代币💰支出竞赛，从〜终身Vercel AI网关使用开始，每月汇总数百万开发人员的数万亿代币。令人着迷的是看到实验室之间的波动、Anthropic的主导地位以及开放式权重AI的崛起。

Guarantee you Ryan and all his degenerate buddies were protesting against Lurie’s YIMBY Family Zoning plans 

We want to build housing and make the city safe

They want to destroy housing, jobs and make the city unsafe 

Make it make sense! You can’t.

remarks.name: Thibault Sottiaux
remarks.role: Codex & ChatGPT OpenAI
remarks.text:
A silly, but made me laugh interaction with Sol

-----------------

🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡
🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡
🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡

> 🫡 Salute received, loud and clear. Carry on!

* 12

> 39 × 12 = 468 🫡

- 800

> 468 − 800 = −332 🫡

?

> There were 39 🫡 emojis.
> (39 × 12) − 800 = 468 − 800 = −332.

how can you have negative emojis

> You can’t physically. −332 🫡 means you’re short 332 salutes or ... owe 332 salutes.
> Actual emojis remaining: 0 🫡, with a 332-salute debt.

🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡
🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡
🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡🫡

> Payment received: 39 🫡
> Remaining salute debt: 293 🫡

hahaha

> The salute economy is ruthless. 🫡📉

remarks.name: Matt Turck
remarks.role: VC at FirstMarkCap.  Host: MAD Podcast; Organizer: Data Driven NYC, Author: MAD Landscape.
remarks.text:
Tough game but France got it done.  Between Argentina and this game today, refereeing is becoming a major issue in this tournament.  3 yellows for France and zero for Paraguay who played like thugs?

Also, France, stop passing the ball to Rabiot for long-range shots lol
remarks.translation: 比赛很艰难，但法国做到了。今天在阿根廷和这场比赛之间，裁判正在成为这场比赛的一个主要问题。法国队打了3个黄牌，巴拉圭队打了0个像暴徒一样的球？还有，法国，别再把球传给拉比奥长距离投篮了哈哈

remarks.name: Nikunj Kothari
remarks.role: partner fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire meter, opendoor, atlassian & others. love shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧
remarks.text:
Moved to America for undergrad and have lived here ever since then..

Grateful to this country for the endless kindness it has bestowed on me. 

Like any country it has its own share of issues, but convinced there’s no greater land of opportunity. 

Here’s to the next 250 🇺🇸
remarks.translation: 搬到美国读本科，从那时起就一直住在这里。感谢这个国家给予我的无尽善意。像任何国家一样，它也有自己的问题，但相信没有更大的机会。这是接下来的250个 🇺🇸
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Cat Wu
remarks.role: claude code + cowork anthropicai, prev: dagster, scale_ai
remarks.text:
One of the things I love about Claude Fable 5 is that it knew to use propensity score matching (matching users on activity so you compare like with like) in my retention analysis without me asking.

It’s exciting to see Fable 5’s improved judgment across all of its work, from writing emails and docs in Cowork to debugging complex errors in Claude Code
remarks.translation: 我喜欢Claude Fable 5的一点是，它知道在我的留存分析中使用倾向分数匹配（在活动上匹配用户，这样你就可以像喜欢一样进行比较） ，而无需我询问。令人兴奋的是， Fable 5的所有工作都得到了改进，从在Cowork中编写电子邮件和文档到调试Claude Code中的复杂错误
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.translation: @ dwarkesh_sp上@ 3blue1brown的最大教训是，我一直在误读每一位著名数学家的名字
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Nan Yu
remarks.role: head of product linear
remarks.text: When I wrote code by hand I would utter a constant stream of profanities while in flow state. So this is basically AGI https://t.co/qaKVedlm6I
remarks.translation: 当我手动编写代码时，我会在流程状态下不断发出亵渎性言论。所以这基本上是AGI
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 AI 编程工具、设计到代码流程和软件生产方式的变化；需要结合产品发布或文档再做事实判断。

remarks.name: Nan Yu
remarks.role: head of product linear
remarks.text: If you drop every production table does the model get fired or do you get fired. https://t.co/tvhupo3nh3
remarks.translation: 如果您丢弃每个生产表，模型是否会被解雇或您是否会被解雇。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察模型运行、算力、存储、sandbox 或开发平台基础设施的变化；后续事实判断需回到原始公告或技术文档。

remarks.name: Nan Yu
remarks.role: head of product linear
remarks.text:
The best way to catch bugs is to use the product and see if you can break it. 

You’re not going to find most bugs by dead reckoning the code. 

You’re reviewing the code itself for architecture and API design… to control the increase in technical debt
remarks.translation: 捕捉错误的最佳方法是使用产品，看看是否可以打破它。你不会通过清算代码来找到大多数错误。您正在审查架构和API设计的代码本身......以控制技术债务的增加
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 AI 编程工具、设计到代码流程和软件生产方式的变化；需要结合产品发布或文档再做事实判断。

remarks.name: Simon Willison's Blog
remarks.role: AI coding tools, LLM release notes, prompt engineering, datasette ecosystem, developer workflow observations.
remarks.text: Open Source AI Gap Map
remarks.content: Open Source AI Gap Map Current AI is "a global partnership building a public option for AI", founded as a non-profit at the AI Action Summit in Paris in February 2025 and backed by serious capital

remarks.text: Count the number of Safari tabs
